DIV8.HEAD: § 172.102 Special provisions.
DIV8.FP-1: A3 For combination packagings, if glass inner packagings are used, they must be packed with absorbent material.
148 The most recent version of the test described applies.
DIV8.FP1-2: 398 This entry applies to 1-butylene, cis-2-butylene and trans-2-butylene, and mixtures of butylenes.
DIV8.P: (6) "R" codes. These provisions apply only to transportation by rail.
R1 A person who offers tank cars containing molten sulfur may reference the guidance document.
TP1 The maximum degree of filling must not exceed the degree determined by the formula.

TR.TD: Authorized IBCs: Metal (31A, 31B and 31N); Rigid plastics (31H1 and 31H2); Composite (31HZ1).
Additional Requirement: Only liquids with a vapor pressure less than or equal to 110 kPa at 50 °C are authorized.

CAPTION.P: Table of Portable Tank T Codes
